events.title: MotoAmerica Superbike at Road America
events.description: MotoAmerica Superbike races return to Road America. Qualifying Friday, all-day racing Saturday & Sunday. Five classes of road racing.
events.location: Road America, N7390 WI-67, Plymouth, WI

events.title: WeatherTech Chicago Region June Sprints
events.description: The 71st running of the historic June Sprints at Road America. One of the premier amateur road racing events in North America.

events.title: Elktoberfest 2026
events.description: Bavarian fun returns to Elkhart Lake! Stein hoists, brats, pretzels, polka, and live music. Includes Elktoberfest Run/Walk and family fun in the park.
